raw_consumer_statement:
Company : American Express Merchant : XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX Complaint text : I am filing a complaint regarding American Expresss refusal to investigate a charge made by XXXX XXXX XXXX due to the 120-day dispute limit.

This charge resulted from deceptive and misleading sales practices at a resort. I attempted to cancel the membership immediately and never used any of the services. I contacted the merchant within days to cancel, but they refused to honor the cancellation.

Although the dispute window has passed, this is a case of misrepresentation and unfair business practices. I am requesting that American Express conduct a courtesy review or billing adjustment and document the deceptive conduct of this merchant, who has a documented pattern of similar complaints. 

I am requesting Amex reconsider this charge outside of the standard dispute timeframe due to the circumstances.
